# hindclaw_banks (Data Source)

Lists all Hindsight banks.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hindclaw_banks" "all" {}

output "bank_ids" {
  value = [for b in data.hindclaw_banks.all.banks : b.bank_id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `banks` (Attributes List) List of banks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--banks))

<a id="nestedatt--banks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `banks`

Read-Only:

- `bank_id` (String) Bank ID.
- `name` (String) Bank name.
